name: Tom Cotton
subject: Re: Cancel Culture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
There is a new problem in our society: Cancel Culture. It threatens the very principles of free inquiry and open debate upon which our society is based. Cancel Culture is the idea that we all need safe spaces from mean words. Trigger warnings on op-eds or TV shows that might constitute a microaggression. The radical left is trying to get the children's cartoon Paw Patrol canceled because these shows have the audacity to portray law enforcement officers in a positive light.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42746014&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDYwMTQS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

There is a new problem in our society: Cancel Culture.

It threatens the very principles of free inquiry and open debate upon which our society is based.

Cancel Culture is the idea that we all need safe spaces from mean words. Trigger warnings on op-eds or TV shows that might constitute a microaggression.

The radical left is trying to get the children's cartoon _Paw Patrol_ canceled because these shows have the audacity to portray law enforcement officers in a positive light.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDYwMTQS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

They have already successfully bullied the network into canceling _Live PD_ , all because the show highlighted interactions with actual police offices.

Peter, if you are fed up with the politically correct crowd, [**join my movement to stop this madness and return sanity to our country.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDYwMTQS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_
[Stop the Madness >>> Add Your Name](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDYwMTQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

**The far-left is becoming increasingly radicalized --and they need to be stopped.**

Legos has announced they will no longer advertise their police sets. HBO will no longer run Gone with the Wind. Never mind that African American actress Hattie McDaniel won the first Academy Award, the first Oscar ever given to an African American woman for her role in the movie.

This is not progress--it's mob rule and madness.

This isn't going to stop with children's shows or legos. The liberal mob will soon turn their sights on every aspect of our lives.

I am not afraid to speak out against these radicals and their ridiculous demands. Someone has to step up and stop the madness.

Peter, are you with me?

[Stop the Madness >>> Add Your Name](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDYwMTQS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

The fundamental principles that made our country great are under attack like never before.

Where does this madness end?

[**Join our movement and help return sanity to our country.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDYwMTQS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In service,

Tom Cotton
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NDYwMTQS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQxNDk3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Sen. Tom Cotton, KT McFarland Join #TeamHagerty
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-jd/) June 16, 2020 **Hagerty Releases New TV Ad** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-r/) #TeamHagerty released a new ad last week highlighting Bill Hagerty's business experience. Just like President Trump, Bill is a can-do businessman. Hagerty led economic development in our state as the commissioner of the Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development, making our economy one of the strongest in America. That's why President Trump put Hagerty on his advisory board to rebuild America's economy. Bill Hagerty will fight to bring manufacturing jobs back from China while cutting taxes for small businesses and workers. Read Bill's Blueprint To Bring Jobs Back To The United States **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Sen. Tom Cotton Is On #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-j/) Senator Tom Cotton (AR-R) has joined the growing list of those endorsing Bill for U.S. Senate. A true conservative leader, Senator Cotton has been leading the way on calling out the Communist Chinese Party for what it is - an authoritarian regime that has lied repeatedly to the world about the Wuhan virus. We're excited to have Senator Cotton on #TeamHagerty! **KT McFarland Endorses Bill Hagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-t/) KT McFarland is the latest to join President Trump in endorsing Bill Hagerty's campaign to represent Tennesseans in the U.S. Senate. #TeamHagerty is proud to have the support of KT, who served as Deputy National Security Advisor under President Donald Trump. **Tele-Town Hall With SBA List Candidate Fund PAC** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-i/) Last week, #TeamHagerty hosted a tele-town hall with the honorable Marilyn Musgrave, Vice President of Government Affairs for the Susan B. Anthony (SBA) List. The event provides Tennesseans across the state with an update on SBA List's latest issue campaigns and how they are working to support the right to life. The SBA Candidate Fund PAC has endorsed Bill's campaign for U.S. Senate. You can listen to the full tele-town hall **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-d/)**
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-h/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-k/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-u/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Columbia Daily Herald:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-m/)** Local opinion: Meet Bill Hagerty, Trump's choice in Tennessee's U.S. Senate race**[Tennessean:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-c/)** Tom Cotton endorses Bill Hagerty in Tennessee's Republican US Senate primary**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-q/) **Bill Hagerty Announces Law Enforcement for Hagerty Coalition**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-a/)** Bill Hagerty Says He Stands with Law Enforcement Officers**[Smith County Insider:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-f/)** Press Release: Team Hagerty Promotes Braden Stover To Deputy Campaign Manager**[The Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-z/)** Bill Hagerty Will Join President Trump In Standing Up For Our Troops And Veterans**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-v/)** Fmr US Ambassador to Japan Hagerty: Chinese Communists Using U.S. Unrest 'to Retain Authoritarian Rule over People'
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-g/)_" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revial. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pjhpjt-fuutjhhtj-ji/)
---|---|---|---|---

Nashville, TN 37215

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Did you see me on Fox News this morning?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:

| |
---|---|---
| Friends, I joined Fox News this morning to discuss the continuing COVID-19 pandemic and increase in cases over the past few weeks. I believe that while there has been an uptick in cases, we should not shut down our economy again. We cannot afford to shut down and must employ a vertical containment strategy, as I've been saying for months. We need to be thoughtful about our social distancing and hand hygiene, rather than a full leftwing lockdown. We cannot allow these Democrat Mayors to support rioting and protesting by thousands of people, and not allow businesses to open or allow folks to go to church. [What the full interview here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkjdlrly-uunkhiuw-y/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkjdlrly-uunkhiuw-j/) [Watch My Full interview with fox news here](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkjdlrly-uunkhiuw-t/) We need a Senator who will work alongside President Trump to implement real strategies and real solutions to our nation's toughest problems. Would you consider pitching in $10 right now to send me to the US Senate and stand with President Trump? subject: Is It February?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17898975/210425911/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJiMmJmMi05OWIwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45PyU2QNaH3EQExwdkmlAbemaI6PqYX81vX2YKRPCYc=&emci=d002a04f-92b0-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=492b2bf2-99b0-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10438639) _Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.[**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17898976/210425912/1282705599?refcode=06172020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJiMmJmMi05OWIwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45PyU2QNaH3EQExwdkmlAbemaI6PqYX81vX2YKRPCYc=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, Nationally, the average number of new COVID-19 cases is ticking back up, and models are now predicting 200,000 fatalities by October. Yet Trump and his enablers, including my Republican opponents, are acting like they did in February - downplaying the risks and pretending it will just disappear. Lockdowns are blunt force tools to try to contain the spread that have incredible economic and social costs of their own. We realistically only had one shot at a nationwide lockdown to flatten the curve. We squandered it. Even now we could be taking simple steps to make re-opening safer and accelerate the recovery by simply wearing a mask, maintaining social distancing, avoiding crowded indoor venues, protecting those most vulnerable to the disease, and (better late than never) building the test/trace/quarantine capability needed to identify and contain outbreaks. Instead, the administration has turned mask wearing and social distancing into a culture war clash, and resumption of religious services and political rallies a statement of defiance of a "tyrannical" government. I'll leave you with this question - a partial quote from a piece in the NYT this morning: "is your strategy for maximizing lives and livelihoods based on chemistry, biology and physics and not politics, ideology and election dates? Because Mother Nature is only chemistry, biology, and physics and responds to nothing else." You deserve better. **[Demand Better by pitching in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17898977/210425913/-1907457919?refcode=061720_line_bottom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJiMmJmMi05OWIwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45PyU2QNaH3EQExwdkmlAbemaI6PqYX81vX2YKRPCYc=). ** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17898978/210425914/1282705599?refcode=06172020_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJiMmJmMi05OWIwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45PyU2QNaH3EQExwdkmlAbemaI6PqYX81vX2YKRPCYc=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17898979/210425915/1282705599?refcode=06172020_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJiMmJmMi05OWIwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45PyU2QNaH3EQExwdkmlAbemaI6PqYX81vX2YKRPCYc=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17898980/210425916/1282705599?refcode=06172020_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJiMmJmMi05OWIwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45PyU2QNaH3EQExwdkmlAbemaI6PqYX81vX2YKRPCYc=)**

name: Betsy R
subject: Ohio is better than this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
It's been embarrassing enough to have Jim Jordan as the face of Ohio that the nation sees in Congress, but now our Ohio Republican legislature is making national news for bigotry. People around the country ask me,_what happened to Ohio?_ And I say, this isn't Ohio. This is a gerrymandered, extremist legislature that doesn't represent us. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fvf7UEXpj3Xb5cPr5AFLt8fY1YqOIOcRHC9EdxHnNs=/hXL_ClRqRzRpj42811bu_vx8Zcft9cWegg-qIsaZX4E=) The country used to look to our state as a bellwether for the nation, "as Ohio goes..." Now they see us going in the opposite direction from where the country is headed. But I know Ohio and I know we are so much better than what the world sees in our extremist Republican lawmakers. During the past two weeks I have seen beautiful passionate rallies for Black Lives Matter all over my District, from its most conservative to its most liberal corners. I have seen the celebration of the Supreme Court's decision this week that ALL people have the right to work free from discrimination, including LGBTQ people. I have met young people, working parents and retirees who all see a brighter future that is inclusive of everyone. **If we want to move forward, we must elect leaders this year who will represent all these voices - the voices of hope, the voices of change, the voices of progress. As a civil rights lawyer, I fight to make these voices heard and I will continue to do so as a State Senator.** _**But that means people need to know they have a choice. Sharing our message is more difficult due to the restrictions of the pandemic **__**since we are not able to reach voters in public as we have in the past**_ _**. If you could chip in $15 today to help us pay for our digital team to reach voters, it would be a big help.**_ We can make our state better, but we need more people like you to know about our race. Thank you for stepping up and for your support. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fvf7UEXpj3Xb5cPr5AFLt8fY1YqOIOcRHC9EdxHnNs=/HMyT2h_BrJK7RsjgbBqu2u92wXPYJNdIFkM8iJjELEg=?refcode=email6.17&amount=10) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fvf7UEXpj3Xb5cPr5AFLt8fY1YqOIOcRHC9EdxHnNs=/HOA6pmNBRzv5FtJB49IKGGhNF4Pu6LjgafClHxXwkiM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fvf7UEXpj3Xb5cPr5AFLt8fY1YqOIOcRHC9EdxHnNs=/yrnjcX4C34doZXM1E4F8bf8FcY5L5FjQk8hp24fTsXw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fvf7UEXpj3Xb5cPr5AFLt8fY1YqOIOcRHC9EdxHnNs=/KRdQ_5seCWye1479igHCJnfe8w6mN1w3_lN89VOaRKY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fvf7UEXpj3Xb5cPr5AFLt8fY1YqOIOcRHC9EdxHnNs=/jfJnLtEzyLVAkVyTEyitPvVm0xdRd0MT6ExMdipwizM=)

subject: Dems tried to SUE to cancel Rally

body:
Yesterday, Speaker Pelosi reached out directly to tell you everything you need to know about our race.
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Friend,

Yesterday, Speaker Pelosi reached out directly (below) to tell you everything you need to know about our race. And what it boils down to is this: **Flipping PA-10 blue in November is critical to expanding the Democratic House Majority, but _we can’t do it without your support._ **

[**This is one of the top congressional races in the entire country, and our major FEC fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching. Scott Perry and his special interest backers will be looking for any sign of weakness in our public fundraising report. ➡️ Special interest groups have poured **over a million dollars** into this race in an effort to prop up his opponent

subject: If we're going to win, we need to hit every goal we set
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why hitting our goal is so important:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why hitting our goal is so important:

Kansas' 2nd District is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country. Democrats lost in 2018 by less than 1 point and the DCCC has named it a top battleground this year. This race is going to be neck-and-neck, so we need to ensure we hit every goal we set so we have the resources to elect Michelle to lift up the voices of all Kansans.

But we have just hours before our mid-month deadline and we're still $2,122 away from our goal.

clean_body: Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why hitting our goal is so important: Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team. Friends, Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why hitting our goal is so important: Kansas' 2nd District is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country. Democrats lost in 2018 by less than 1 point and the DCCC has named it a top battleground this year. This race is going to be neck-and-neck, so we need to ensure we hit every goal we set so we have the resources to elect Michelle to lift up the voices of all Kansans. But we have just hours before our mid-month deadline and we're still $2,122 away from our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Michelle is the different type of leader we need fighting for us in Congress. She understands the problems facing Kansans, because she's faced them too, and she's ready to put partisan politics aside to do what's best for our families. But if we fall short of our mid-month goal, we risk not having the resources it takes to send her to Congress. That's why we're relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up before our deadline to help us hit our goal. = Thanks, Stephanie Stephanie Houghton Campaign Manager Team Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. subject: One week away - will you be joining Martin Luther King III and me?

body:

Congressman Al Green

For a virtual discussion with
Martin Luther King, III

Wednesday, June 24 2020
4:00 to 5:00PM Central

This event is the first of a three-part series on race relations and criminal justice reform in the United States. The funds raised at these events will be used for the 2020 General Election.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Time to Turn Up the Heat
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_to_turn_up_the_heat&n=1)
---
Peter -- I'll be brief... **Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is cutting deals with the Democrats right now! He's about to sell us out on ending Walz' emergency powers so they can get millions of dollars in pork using the state credit card.** Even worse: the debt bill is likely to include $300 Million to rebuild Minneapolis. How do you like being on the hook for Jacob Frey's stand down order that led to destruction of property and total chaos? It's unbelievable that the Republican Senate is willing to trade debt for an agreement to allow Walz' emergency powers to continue on. Was their vote on Friday nothing but a smoke screen? When politicians try to hoodwink us, there's only one thing to do...
## **TURN UP THE HEAT!**
You've joined our ranks because you want us to hold these politicians accountable. You've told us that Walz' emergency powers are harming our economy and infringing on your rights. And we're listening. Right now Action 4 Liberty has phone callers and door knocking teams deployed to hold these politicians accountable. We're hoping to keep them there only this week, but if they don't stand up and refuse to pass the debt bill until the House votes down Walz' power, then we'll make this painful for them in election time! **We can't do this without you. Help us bring the heat by[donating $100, $50, $25 or even $10 today](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_to_turn_up_the_heat&n=2). The Special Session is done on Friday, so our greatest chance to end Walz' power is NOW!** Please equip are team with the resources they need to hold these politicians accountable. There's no deal worth allowing our governor to keep his illegal, unilateral powers. Help us get this message to the right people! | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_to_turn_up_the_heat&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_to_turn_up_the_heat&n=4)
---
Also, don't forget to reach out to Senator Paul Gazelka today and tell him:
1\. Stop making deals with Democrats with a massive debt bill
2\. Tell the Democrats in the House to end Walz' powers or you will adjourn
## Sen Paul Gazelka
## 651-296-4875
## [Email Gazelka here](mailto:sd09iq@mnsenate.lmhostediq.com)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_to_turn_up_the_heat&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_to_turn_up_the_heat&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_to_turn_up_the_heat&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Re: last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Well, we officially missed our fundraising goal last night and now, we are not on track for the most important FEC deadline of the campaign so far. There’s a silver lining: We didn’t fall short by a lot, but it’s still enough to make a big difference in our re-election battle. And I’ll tell you why that matters. Minnesota is a must-win state with a must-win Senate seat for Democrats to take back the majority in Washington. But we're a top target for Donald Trump, who is resuming campaign rallies _this week_ and could be returning to our state any day now. How do I know this? **The polling data from Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ show Trump within a single digit of winning our state.** With the FEC deadline right around the corner, any slip up now could hobble our campaign and give Trump the advantage he so desperately wants, so I’m personally asking you: **Can I count on you to rush a donation of $10 or more to help us catch up on yesterday's missed goal? clean_body: | Well, we officially missed our fundraising goal last night and now, we are not on track for the most important FEC deadline of the campaign so far. There’s a silver lining: We didn’t fall short by a lot, but it’s still enough to make a big difference in our re-election battle. And I’ll tell you why that matters. Minnesota is a must-win state with a must-win Senate seat for Democrats to take back the majority in Washington. But we're a top target for Donald Trump, who is resuming campaign rallies this week and could be returning to our state any day now. How do I know this? The polling data from Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight show Trump within a single digit of winning our state. With the FEC deadline right around the corner, any slip up now could hobble our campaign and give Trump the advantage he so desperately wants, so I’m personally asking you: Can I count on you to rush a donation of $10 or more to help us catch up on yesterday's missed goal? Every single donation makes a huge difference in our work to keep Minnesota from flipping red. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The ground is always shifting beneath our feet as we fight to take back the Senate majority and win our race. A missed goal like this could be enough to give Trump and the GOP the boost they need. Your contribution today will help us make up for this temporary lapse and put our campaign in a strong position as we head into the next phase of this election. Thanks for reading. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

#
We are honored to invite you to join US Congressman Bill Foster on June 26th at Virtual Event to support Dani Brzozowski! [G](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=332e712abd&e=140a9b81e7)[rab your tickets here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e4d2a08510&e=140a9b81e7)

Last week, we announced that Congressman Foster had endorsed our campaign, and we couldn't be more excited. **Rep. Foster is a man of science who has stood tall against the Trump Administration's disastrous approach to climate change and COVID-19**. We are proud to have Congressman Foster in our corner.

Join us and let's send Dani to DC with Congressman Foster!

We hope to see you there,

Team Dani

name: Jake C.
subject: Help get out the vote for Adem!
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/hra8l9fI4oqCeJqf40phVqv5rdsPT387wf42D-g6D7c=)

Peter,

From all of us here on Team Adem, I want to thank you for being a supporter -- whether you've been with us since day one or just recently joined our movement, we couldn't have come this far without you. And if you've always wanted to get a little more involved in the campaign but never quite found the right opportunity, these next few days are when we need your passion, excitement, and dedication the most: **[Will you become a volunteer today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/nC642F-kHp4NJsiKY360zsKiNYtD8gvIiiUI54k6_lE=)**

******[CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/AZXYeAgxNxxn4HKwERtvVxZ9c6Y768ggdXQgflpTwYg=)******

We're officially less than one week out from Primary Day on Tuesday, June 23rd -- but voters across the district are already receiving their mail-in ballots or beginning to head down to the polls to cast their votes early. But before they do, we need to make our case one last time so that every voter knows why Adem deserves their support. That means making more calls, sending out more texts, and doing more socially-distanced outreach than ever before -- [**and it 's going to take each and every one of us stepping up to help get the word out**.](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/nC642F-kHp4NJsiKY360zsKiNYtD8gvIiiUI54k6_lE=)

This election season is unlike any other, so above all, we're working to ensure that voters understand when, where, and how to cast their ballot safely. But this race has changed so much in just the last week alone -- as evidenced by Adem's recent _New York Times_ endorsement -- that we still have tons of new information to share with voters. We're counting down every moment until Primary Day, and calculating how many voters we're reaching on a daily basis: Even just one or two hours of your time will make a huge impact on these numbers. There isn't much time left, so it's all hands on deck. **[If you haven't volunteered with us yet -- or even if you have! -- will you join our team with less than one week to go and get out the vote for Adem?](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/nC642F-kHp4NJsiKY360zsKiNYtD8gvIiiUI54k6_lE=)**

Best,
Jake

******[BECOME A VOLUNTEER TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/AZXYeAgxNxxn4HKwERtvVxZ9c6Y768ggdXQgflpTwYg=)******

* * *

******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/ssc2GLZoHJarhsAPcYICHvbYD8X41IIxZ8JgY6jHycY=)******

******[BECOME A VOLUNTEER](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/AZXYeAgxNxxn4HKwERtvVxZ9c6Y768ggdXQgflpTwYg=)******

******[VISIT OUR WEBSITE](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoMlYnhnpYAcTwZzSFIxKD2VJWtCS7lK1z-TinTifOc=/wNERR67SvRCQcodbFti0rRw2MnQyj5nHgsyvmEStAHk=)******

* * *

subject: 13 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, We are 13 short days away from the June 30th Oklahoma Republican primary, and I wanted to make sure you've made a plan to vote. **You can find your polling place online right now at: https://okvoterportal.okelections.us.** **As we head into the final days of this primary, our campaign is preparing to mount a big get-out-the-vote push and we need your help to fund it!** [If your means allow, will you please take a moment to chip in $5, $10, or $25 right now?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/hLCBdRbxOUDjmBHU7638qsRQ/ghjGxXhFZuAO763hMN2Xq0kw) **By making a small contribution today, you can help ensure all of our volunteers are well fed as they reach out to Republican voters over the course of the next two weeks. ** Let's go win this thing! Thank you for your continued support. Terry Neese
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/BHu98H0ChJekaxqCQpj75A/ghjGxXhFZuAO763hMN2Xq0kw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/66PKUlsH5AaH4KLkFSE5LQ/ghjGxXhFZuAO763hMN2Xq0kw)

In his role as a Senior Advisor, John Pence offers the Trump 2020 campaign critical advice and guidance as they move toward a major victory in November.

I look forward to seeing you Thursday and thank you for your continued support.

It’s clear that Mondaire is the front-runner in this race. Other candidates have already been attacking him. At yesterday’s debate, several candidates took cheap shots against Mondaire for supporting Medicare for All, even as 40 million Americans lost their jobs over the last 10 weeks.

subject: Special message from Senator Young
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We have a special message from Senator Todd Young on how we’re going to win BIG in Indiana. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469365?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq1-061620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Special_message_from_Senator_Young&amount=&mc_cid=419078826a&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

2020 is shaping up to be a tumultuous year.

It’s never been clearer that we need to remove Nancy Pelosi from the Speaker’s office for her failed leadership.

We have a special message from Senator Todd Young about our plan to make that happen:

https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq1-061620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Special_message_from_Senator_Young&amount=&mc_cid=419078826a&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Are you ready to help us fire Speaker Pelosi once and for all?

We have a battleground race right here in Indiana. Victoria Spartz needs our help to win in the 5th Congressional District if we have any hope of flipping the House RED this November.

With fundraising numbers finalized in our end of quarter report on June 30, we need to make a strong showing to send the message that Hoosiers aren’t going to stand idly by for business as usual in Washington.

Will you please rush a donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can now, if you agree with Senator Young that it’s time to fire Speaker Pelosi for good? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq1-061620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Special_message_from_Senator_Young&amount=&mc_cid=419078826a&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We’re going to get through this trying time. We’re going to elect a new conservative majority, and flip the House for the GOP.

Your support will be critical to our success in 2020. If you’re able, we hope to have your immediate support today.

Donate Now >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq1-061620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Special_message_from_Senator_Young&amount=&mc_cid=419078826a&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Thank you,
The Indiana Republican Party

Donate Now >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq1-061620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Special_message_from_Senator_Young&amount=&mc_cid=419078826a&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Rita Hart
subject: [poll] closing the revolving door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/b6I1iNSXfDOkf_kcEPMFyEfMl6ub-VcHCnw5Y9TTEa0=) I'm still listening to you. I want to know what you think: **Do you believe members of Congress should be able to work as lobbyists?** | ****[Yes](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/b6I1iNSXfDOkf_kcEPMFyEfMl6ub-VcHCnw5Y9TTEa0=)****
****[No](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/b6I1iNSXfDOkf_kcEPMFyEfMl6ub-VcHCnw5Y9TTEa0=)****
---
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/vdc0oldlZebdeZVxR7ic-QTwFDcq94yDL2WnmBDgP24=)
Peter,
In Washington, we see the same thing happen time and again -- the loudest and most powerful voices drown out the rest of us. Special interests use money as speech to stymie our efforts to lower the cost of health care, invest in education and raise wages for everyone.
I want to fight that corruption.
One of the ways I'll do that on day one is by banning members of Congress from becoming lobbyists. _Permanently!_
**[I want to know what you think about this -- do you think our representatives should be able to work in lucrative lobbying jobs and use their connections to help corporations? Take my 30-second survey!](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/b6I1iNSXfDOkf_kcEPMFyEfMl6ub-VcHCnw5Y9TTEa0=)**
****[Yes](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/b6I1iNSXfDOkf_kcEPMFyEfMl6ub-VcHCnw5Y9TTEa0=)****
****[No](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/b6I1iNSXfDOkf_kcEPMFyEfMl6ub-VcHCnw5Y9TTEa0=)****
---
I want to put Washington back to work for all of us, not just the loudest voices in the room. That's why I support common-sense legislation that would stop special interests and corporations from using their money to stop legislation that helps the American people.
But I also want to make sure you're with me in this fight. Let me know below. **[Do you believe lawmakers should be able to have second careers as lobbyists?](https://act.myngp.com/el/BR5XNkNWEd-q7hRaMMTqGhu12YjfgEecCv0S2qeNfng=/b6I1iNSXfDOkf_kcEPMFyEfMl6ub-VcHCnw5Y9TTEa0=)**
Thank you so much,

Rita Hart

Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States

name: Debbie Lesko
subject: we need Tiffany's voice in Congess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, I am proud to support President Trump. In Congress, I served on President Trump’s impeachment defense team, responding to the lies drafted by the Democrats. The entire impeachment fiasco was a sham process run by Nancy Pelosi for the express purpose of removing our President from office. Tom O’Halleran voted lockstep with Pelosi to impeach our President -- without ANY evidence. I know my friend Tiffany Shedd would stand up against Pelosi and her political stunts. That’s why I’m proud to endorse her for Congress. I know **Tiffany stands with President Trump,** and I know she’ll continue to do so. **Tiffany is a proven conservative leader and is by far the best candidate to represent Arizona’s First District.** She has proven that she will stand against the rise of socialism and fight for what REALLY matters to our state. More importantly, she’ll work with our congressional delegation to get things done in Washington. **[Can you help make sure Tiffany goes to Washington by donating name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Prove them wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

I’m so proud of how much our campaign has already accomplished.

We launched our movement almost three years ago with a simple mission: That we wouldn’t let anything hold us back from getting out to the people and bringing folks across the political spectrum into our campaign.

We knew in our hearts that this district was winnable and worth fighting for and that’s exactly what we proved. We came within 3 points of a nine-term incumbent in a district won by Donald Trump by 27 points in 2016. And this year, we defeated that incumbent, Steve King.

But yet again, pollsters and political pundits are counting us out in November. They're saying our opponent will have an easy path to Washington because they don't believe we have what it takes to flip this district blue.

**But I know they're wrong.**

**[We're going to prove that by posting undeniable fundraising numbers this quarter. A lot of folks think we can’t make our June fundraising goal of $50,000 -- can you help prove them wrong, Peter? But I know they're wrong. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We are hearing that our opponent, Randy Feenstra, is making the rounds through corporate and lobbyist donor circles, raking in every last dollar that he can. These are the same folks who convinced him to run in the first place. Iowans can’t afford more politicians who put profit-over-people. And that’s why we do things differently. We rely on our small dollar donors and we represent the hardworking folks who just want a decent life for their family. = = Standing Tall for All, J.D. Scholten =

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Sen. Cornyn's retirement plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn's tweeting is embarrassing to us as Texans and Americans, and it's time he did it as a private citizen.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d8/7f51f7bc/4e91c0cb/4ef6d168/74752292/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- After nearly two decades in the U.S. Senate selling out Texans to the highest special interest bidder, we think it's time to send Sen. Cornyn into retirement, where he'll have plenty of time for social media. After all, Sen. Cornyn spends A LOT of his time tweeting instead of leading.

Frankly, it's embarrassing. From quoting Mussolini to saying COVID-19 is a "piece of cake" and denying systemic problems with police brutality, Texans deserve better. **[That's why we're asking you to donate to Sen. Cornyn's Retirement Fund!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d8/7f51f7bc/4e91c0cb/4ef6d16f/74752292/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.1nd__1561__&amount=10")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d8/7f51f7bc/4e91c0cb/4ef6d16f/74752292/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.1nd__1561__&amount=10") | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901d8/7f51f7bc/4e91c0cb/4ef6d16f/74752292/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.1nd__1561__&amount=10")

---|---
Look, we don't think Sen. Cornyn's Twitter antics are helpful to anyone. But if he's going to carry on tweeting, we think he should do it as a private citizen, where his words don't carry the weight of a U.S. senator.

MJ believes we should put Texans first, and she'll spend her time in the Senate working to expand health care, enact real protections for our planet and climate, pass gun safety legislation, and carry out meaningful reforms for our justice system. But she can only do this with YOUR help.

**Our grassroots team is devoted to electing a far better representative of Texas values, so pitch in to help us retire Sen. Cornyn today.**

subject: Do YOU support a Black Woman for VP?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Congressional Black Caucus PAC
body:
we need you to answer this question honestly: |
---
| [**POLITICO:** "More Democrats want Biden to pick woman of color as VP"](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc44/693e3cfe/4e84a9c8/3a041dc2/1096286972/VEsH/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Black-Woman-VP?source=MS_EM_POLL_2020.06.17_B2_Black-Woman-VP-Poll_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS") | [Due to this breaking news, we've hand-picked 100 top Democratic Supporters in Florida to get their input. Thank you for participating in our Official VP Poll. Today, we're asking Democrats if they want a Black woman as Vice President.

Joe Biden announced he will DEFINITELY choose a woman as Vice President.

And some say they'd DEFINITELY vote for him in November if he chose a Black woman to be his Vice President.

So as a top Democrat from Florida, we're reaching out to you directly. Please click above or below to answer, even if you are unsure.
[SUBMIT MY RESPONSE NOW ➞](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc44/693e3cfe/4e84a9c8/3a041dc2/1096286972/VEsB/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Black-Woman-VP?source=MS_EM_POLL_2020.06.17_B2_Black-Woman-VP-Poll_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")

name: James Mackler
subject: SCOTUS UPDATE:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
We made a HUGE step, but the fight isn't over
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa121/18d6a294/4c951b93/26d7fb2c/1507226667/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | June is Pride Month, and earlier this week we won a **huge** victory in the fight for equal rights: The Supreme Court ruled that LGBTQ+ Americans cannot be fired on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity. It's an important step in the right direction, but there is still work to be done to ensure**FULL** and **EQUAL** protections under the law for the LGBTQ+ community, including housing, education, public spaces and services, and federally funded programs. **Last year, the House passed the Equality Act, which would extend key provisions of the Civil Rights Act to include sexual orientation and gender identity. But for more than a year, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has refused to take action on the bill.** [_**Friends, as we celebrate Pride this month, will you add your name to mine and demand McConnell bring up and pass the Equality Act?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa121/18d6a294/4c951b93/26d7fb2d/1507226667/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200617pet_main") | | | [ADD YOUR NAME TO MINE NOW: PASS THE EQUALITY ACT >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa121/18d6a294/4c951b93/26d7fb2d/1507226667/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200617pet_main")
---
After the Supreme Court's _Obergefell v. Hodges_ decision, I was able to see my father-in-law marry his partner of 23 years. My wife Shana, who's a rabbi, officiated the ceremony, and our daughters were flower girls.
I was so proud of that moment -- for my family and my country -- but it breaks my heart to think that my daughters' grandpas could be discriminated against just because of who they are and who they love.
**No one should be evicted from their home or refused critical health care because of their sexual orientation or gender identity.**
[_**We need to secure equal protections for the LGBTQ+ community now. Add your name and tell McConnell to bring up the Equality Act for a vote in the Senate.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa121/18d6a294/4c951b93/26d7fb2d/1507226667/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200617pet_main")
| | [ADD YOUR NAME TO MINE NOW: PASS THE EQUALITY ACT >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa121/18d6a294/4c951b93/26d7fb2d/1507226667/VEsD/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200617pet_main")
---
In service,
James

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa121/18d6a294/4c951b93/26d7fb2a/1507226667/VEsA/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/unsubscribe")

name: Bill Olson
subject: RE: Defunding the Police is Insane
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | Hi Peter,

I am not sure you saw my email below. I also want to tell you that I need to raise $40k by the end of this month to keep up with Darren Soto. Can you contribute today to help me reach my goal? I need to reach this win, thank you.
DONATE TODAY: [https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/sr](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=oSLXZUXu_N4fAGSNjsx9YA)
Bill

Reply to dpwillis67@gmail.com
_______________________________________________
| [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)
---
Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto. **

I've seen things in our country over the last two weeks that I never thought I'd see. The left’s fear that Trump is Hitler has made them all Stalin and they are utterly blind to it!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)
---

_Following the tragic death of George Floyd in Minneapolis, the Left- led by domestic terrorism organization Antifa- engaged in riots in dozens of American cities (including some in Florida). _

These riots were destructive and lethal. They resulted in burning hundreds of buildings, homes and businesses- largely in black neighborhoods. Over 150 people died, including two dozen police officers. Over 100 more officers were hospitalized with wounds.

The attacks were brutal and barbaric.

_Police are looking for four men who assaulted NYPD cops in two separate Manhattan incidents amid the George Floyd protests this week — including one suspect who threw a brick at a lieutenant and another who tossed a fire extinguisher at a cop._

_The NYPD said the lieutenant and another officer were trying to arrest protesters Sunday around 10:30 p.m. outside the Strand Bookstore, two blocks from Union Square, when two men threw a brick at the lieutenant and hit the second officer with a stick, cellphone video shows._

_Lt. Jorge Rodriguez told NBC 4 News on Tuesday that he "felt like I got shot.”_

**Another cop was lit on fire by rioters. Three black cops were killed by rioters, which I guess means that black lives really didn't matter to the rioters. **

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)
---

So you see how the radical Left values the police. Basically, they want the police to enforce their draconian Socialist edicts and take on all the risk to their lives and families... _and then defund them._

That's right. The new call from the radical Left- and their Democrat allies in Congress- is to defund the police. Some, in certain cities like Minneapolis, don't just want to reduce the police funding- they want to do away with the police entirely!

_Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar went beyond calls to defund the police following the death of George Floyd, instead calling for dismantling the Minneapolis Police Department because it is “rotten to the root.”_

_Protesters and members of Black Lives Matter have chanted “defund the police” during the nationwide demonstrations over Floyd’s death on May 25._

_“We need to completely dismantle the Minneapolis Police Department. Because here’s the thing, there’s a cancer,” she said, continuing that amputation is needed so it doesn’t spread._

_“The Minneapolis Police Department is rotten to the root, and so when we dismantle it, we get rid of that cancer, and we allow for something beautiful to rise, and that reimagining allows us to figure out what public safety looks like for us,” Omar, a first-term congresswoman, said._

_It is important to understand, that any policy promoted by Ilhan Omar is NOT, in general, a policy that would benefit America_. She's a dangerous traitor.

But this particular reckless policy- defunding or doing away with the police- is a critical error that would destroy society as we know it.

Think about it for a moment. If your daughter is raped, who would you call? A municipal "conflict negotiator"?

If someone broke into your home with a knife, will you call a "community healer"?

Recently, an "expert" guest on CNN said that if you're worried about your safety, that's just "white privilege".

Really? These people are nuts!

I tell you what, if you're in one of these cities, buy your guns now! Because your safety is in danger with Democrat leadership like this.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)
---
**Are you angry yet? Are you concerned for your fellow citizens who want to be safe?**

**I say, ENOUGH! I will stand for the defenseless, even as the Democrats try to destroy our civilization in the name of political correctness. **

_I stand with the brave police and first responders_! I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

_**Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream, like Nancy Pelosi. And I can't afford my own private security like the limousine liberals do!**_

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

_Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida. _

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

_Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution, more safety- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto. _

If so, then [I need your help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

[Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)

[Can I count on you for a donation](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ) of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

**The Democrats are going to lose this year **\- with your help!

_Let's get this done!_
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)
---
Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)
---
P.S. [I really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ), so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP! ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i74W84c8w_6OuRU&b=GmUmFJZafXGdb4qEzcaqhQ)Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

subject: FW: Police live matter 🚔
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | Dear Peter,

I am super short of my monthly goal. We need to raise $60,000 to defeat Pelosi's deputy, GK Butterfield. If everyone who reads my email donates $35, $60, $100 or more we will have more than enough. Will you contribute today?

DONATE: [https://secure.anedot.com/sandysmithforcongress/sre](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=orNYs5HtPecJRV2FDBjy4A)

Thank you, Sandy

Forwarded from dpwillis67@gmail.com _______________________________________________ | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

As you may know, I come from a military family- including my husband and my children. My family has a legacy of service to keeping the American people safe.
Let me be clear: those who seek to riot and burn, then to blame our brave police for their violence and mistakes, CANNOT be allowed to "**_defund the police_** "!
**_These riots were never "peaceful protests". They were grotesquely violent: over 150 killed, over 20 cops killed, hundreds of businesses and homes burned._**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A)
---

Three black cops and several black civilians were murdered by the rioters, meaning that it was likely never about "black lives matter" in the first place.

**_Of course, it was never just protesters. Antifa, foreign actors and what Bill Barr called a "witch's brew" of bad actors drove the violence, arson and murder. _**

_The federal officials gathered with Mr. Barr said they’re tracking the violence nationwide, pointing to investigations into more than 800 arsons and 76 explosive devices at protests. They described the violent actors behind them, from Antifa to the far-right Boogaloo movement._

_Mr. Barr called it a “witch’s brew,” and FBI Director Christopher A. Wray said different groups are involved in different cities._

_Underpinning some of the dissension are the same foreign actors who have tried to meddle in American politics in the past, the officials said — though they didn’t name specific countries nor say exactly what they’ve seen._

_Mr. Barr said they are “playing all sides to exacerbate the violence.”_

_“I believe we have evidence that some foreign hackers and groups associated with foreign governments are focused on this particular situation we have here and exacerbate it every way they can,” he said._

So, possibly Russians or Iranians or ISIS are stirring up a revolution on our streets from young extreme leftists who are murdering cops.

_But actually, it's worse than that. _

**Antifa may be useful idiots to the Russians, but President Trump is not fooled. He is taking on that threat head on!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A)
---

Sensing weakness in Democrat politicians like New York's DeBlasio, or Chicago's Lightfoot, these Antifa rioters have begun to list demands.... starting with defunding- or eliminating- the police.

Already Minneapolis is disbanding the police, urged on by the odious Ilhan Omar:

_Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar went beyond calls to defund the police following the death of George Floyd, instead calling for dismantling the Minneapolis Police Department because it is “rotten to the root.”_

_“We need to completely dismantle the Minneapolis Police Department. Because here’s the thing, there’s a cancer,” she said, continuing that amputation is needed so it doesn’t spread._

Now, anyone who was paying attention knows that these radicals have wanted to get rid of the police all along, so they wouldn't pay for the crimes they committed while rioting.

**Can you imagine how things would go with no police to answer the 911 calls?**

If your wife or daughter is in danger of getting raped... you call, and get a "ritual healer"?

If a dangerous drug addict breaks into your house and threatens your life, you call and get.... a "conflict negotiator"?

If you get caught up in a gang fight or a drug cartel war, who will you call? Your local Antifa rep?

These people don't care about your safety. They want to protect criminals with impunity.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A)
---

We need to restore law and order NOW. I will work with President Trump to hunt down, prosecute, and imprison any member of Antifa who participated in domestic terrorism.

If you support our "President of Law and Order", as I do, **[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A) to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A)
---

President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from these unreasonable socialists, like these governors and mayors. _Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

[Will you help me beat anti-cop Socialist G.K. Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A) I have a goal of $60,000 raised this month, before the fundraising quarter ends. I need your help!

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gyBTCLJvppNxmng&b=uyRNnc1cGTOvZBxki.Pa1A) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

Winterville NC 28590
USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: There Isn’t a Coronavirus ‘Second Wave’
body:
In recent days, the media has taken to sounding the alarm bells over a "second wave" of coronavirus infections. Such panic is overblown. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9da992b678&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# There Isn’t a Coronavirus ‘Second Wave’

“In recent days, the media has taken to sounding the alarm bells over a ‘second wave’ of coronavirus infections. Such panic is overblown,” Vice President Mike Pence writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“While talk of an increase in cases dominates cable news coverage, more than half of states are actually seeing cases decline or remain stable . . . The truth is that we’ve made great progress over the past four months, and it’s a testament to the leadership of President Trump.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29bb9ffb13&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Journalism’s long-standing principles”—objectivity, unbiased reporting, and a commitment to finding the truth—“did not fail; rather, journalists failed to adhere to them. As journalists abandoned those core values in favor of an alternative approach, public trust in the press declined,” media ethics teacher Mark Grabowski writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82105a43eb&e=3ee4985eea)._
---
|
---
| President Trump signed an executive order yesterday to promote safe policing and safe communities. “These measured but meaningful proposals are an excellent start and should receive broad bipartisan support in Congress and widespread adoption by law enforcement agencies,” writes Constitution expert John Malcolm in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc34344a5d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “It should go without saying that the looting and rioting we witnessed recently was not justified by the death of George Floyd. Nowhere in the legal code does it say that one unlawful act can provide an excuse for other unlawful acts . . . Their behavior cannot be sanctioned, nor should it be covered up,” Frank Miele writes for [_RealClearPolitics_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=758ccd6a50&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c537e8c8ad&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db30189471&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8cdd28c766)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
Friends, Our country is at a crossroads. Not only do we face the most consequential election of our lifetime this Fall, but we should also fight our hardest to recapture our way of life. Businesses across the country are feeling the pain, and so are our Indiana families with children. Jim knows that while we should take the proper precautions to keep our country and communities safe, it's also absolutely vital that we get our children back on track, and back in school.
Take a look at what he had to say here: [ ](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=79844e7616484d468838105b90571510&_e=R5Nem4glEKMP571VKUZNQcsahPAFGpkNEz5vR2wY0wd2_aoQeZ-37MkWsNSU7lScF6ECdLVi14E5kCYW0wZN3P_xcVcaZ5Mjx1Vl68Tzs5vUf5jA5g0qkBzdFr0WBuedwbR4HB9qnq61AJUJNr1I_WknXdepOFKHT-7HsDbdQGIimX2dD2jBRpR9_h8dJ-Ly8I55B-1fXerJPmw5I7vI--zvCatXCj5dGiXWSbznOkhp2cDW0keIpKSz_zBarp8oWh_4-wldWj1fUHEjpdXHadzbn4_798OljlpX0Oct3I7tYLl4LhZiQtn3u33wgnSc7mMxnV2SL-DNNviPkDnDcSxNy-wQikCpVlXC8N5k97Q6jyYpQE9wbygcQ48KENL1gjOGoHukU0Fsxaj2TGztKPCYkNZox_w6O01kZorvCBmyLtLyeEWBtErkuNQmfJk4KWP73GKdUbDCSMcQxlbMTQ%3D%3D) **Do you agree that we should reopen schools in the Fall?** [**Reopen Our Schools**](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=79844e7616484d468838105b90571510&_e=R5Nem4glEKMP571VKUZNQcsahPAFGpkNEz5vR2wY0wd2_aoQeZ-37MkWsNSU7lScF6ECdLVi14E5kCYW0wZN3P_xcVcaZ5Mjx1Vl68Tzs5vUf5jA5g0qkBzdFr0WBuedwbR4HB9qnq61AJUJNr1I_WknXdepOFKHT-7HsDbdQGIimX2dD2jBRpR9_h8dJ-Ly8I55B-1fXerJPmw5I7vI-2hq88x3cm-PlshB11HnFP_VoyMOW6pHCM_7xQ6TX1MhRmq1gyWJ1nP3S1cWTyuurtMV7HbV8xBaOKkluwF2LdfNjPFgHO7nnAmuAzdMjopJx_Ou5Yewzm0jHsvYjKYQlQv1jqUGrgS1GvuXhJFWb9A4g3zqb_6ajxU8IrkbDSnF3-ynlBxFCDtlJwOzb6WqWd8WttWD3fQZDql1n1LkyhTmhtUtY-ropfXyzu_ETUwCdaVaPakIwR9VHsKgAEadvA%3D%3D) We live in an exceptional country that guarantees free public education for everyone, and we must continue to teach the next generation. In Congress, Jim has made reopening our schools a top priority. **[Friend, will you join him?](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=79844e7616484d468838105b90571510&_e=R5Nem4glEKMP571VKUZNQcsahPAFGpkNEz5vR2wY0wd2_aoQeZ-37MkWsNSU7lScF6ECdLVi14E5kCYW0wZN3P_xcVcaZ5Mjx1Vl68Tzs5vUf5jA5g0qkBzdFr0WBuedwbR4HB9qnq61AJUJNr1I_WknXdepOFKHT-7HsDbdQGIimX2dD2jBRpR9_h8dJ-Ly8I55B-1fXerJPmw5I7vI-2hq88x3cm-PlshB11HnFP_VoyMOW6pHCM_7xQ6TX1Mh5KUgUX7ummfdv4U-KrWGyK8FBNPQ826BJIdYKLst1DsJsTgBXlm5ywZSNkEvbYq3ymZsdTAO6WKYXr_rdZrbP85BxsxPQEjYdOK0tuRoRO5SfoO0dP-OhggmmHBV2Q9C-sk5m6negh3iVY0OGK77RvQPnKAVVc9apu_MnnT0eRKlOuSNBs6ajncpkLHDt5Cal7Def5UirmCnf4bqF8i9Ug%3D%3D)** Thank you, Team Banks [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=79844e7616484d468838105b90571510&_e=R5Nem4glEKMP571VKUZNQcsahPAFGpkNEz5vR2wY0wd2_aoQeZ-37MkWsNSU7lSczE3OevcOMyNYKBlcadCxEokF9OAFz_v4HZlZyuQe6fqzwZ2QgSTnvVQACS48EPvtJctpnM8voz_v2xzF7a9prscVMjtgHwimk1WGyUIBvAoA9XcjrHHpNET4FphMkHTVJrOEP-u7tIFrmz8hCH8adixpg9e_oimNoJqLvgmlx0tRsw-Kl7RtvR6PjSSm8P-jJ7xhTUFqJHVyoQV2zi6Z9xBZHBgnoPm5ugqLW5ORXQeXfO0J5rd5cvxJjVwqb960xbv4sx-O_1BAvQ8GABUrnAS-y58mfrrnj6jRm4SePe1xstoKDTmzm6gh8IR0R66Tdhup19s-ASVy1I-N48Dxq8b9LivGNo2Vkoc5YJZRobdA7XjsZnjUrbvzi1RNeBFx) PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Olivia=20Maxwell?=
subject: Did you see this?
body:
Lindstrom & Lindstrom Virtual Event |
---
| |
Peter

This is Dave's finance director. We are entering a critical stretch of the campaign. We are putting together our advertising plan for the next 6 weeks, and we need [YOUR HELP](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=b6db2548b1&e=41f8e27552). In order to fully fund our direct mail program, we need to raise an additional $93,283.

We have our mail pieces designed, the printers are standing by, and we are ready to mail thousands of Kansas voters. **The only remaining question is how many total voters we will be able to reach. If we hit our fundraising goal, we will be able to fully fund our mail program, and reach everyone that we need to.**

**We are hosting a virtual fundraiser next Thursday, June 25th to raise funds for our mail program.** **Do you think you can attend?** [Full details are linked here and pasted below](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=d72775ac36&e=41f8e27552). Dave's nephew, Atlanta Falcons Offensive Lineman Chris Lindstrom will be the special guest. Not only will Dave give an update on the campaign, but Chris will share new developments regarding the upcoming NFL Season. You can RSVP by responding to this email or [by clicking here](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=94984da9ad&e=41f8e27552).

Even if you are unable to attend the virtual fundraiser, **we would appreciate you considering making[a contribution to Dave's campaign](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=1849fe0fc1&e=41f8e27552)**. Every dollar raised helps us reach an additional voter, and ensure that a true Kansas Conservative, like Dave, is elected to the U.S. Senate.

Thank you for your time and consideration. We hope you and your family remain safe and healthy during this challenging time.

Sincerely,
Olivia

Olivia Maxwell
Finance Director
Lindstrom for Senate
979-450-6231

---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/about?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=fcd34823bf&e=41f8e27552&c=fd957710b3) [unsubscribe from this list](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=fcd34823bf&e=41f8e27552&c=fd957710b3) [update subscription preferences](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=fcd34823bf&e=41f8e27552)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: four candidates who can flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
When I talk to supporters in Nevada and across the country, one question I hear most often is, "Can Democrats flip the Senate this November?" My answer is yes -- and here's how we'll do it:
According to Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball, the fight for control of the Senate will likely come down to results in four must-win states for Democrats: Arizona, Colorado, Maine, and North Carolina.
That means we need to organize, raise funds, and elect Mark Kelly in Arizona, John Hickenlooper in Colorado, Sara Gideon in Maine, and Cal Cunningham in North Carolina. Winning these races is key to a Democratic Senate -- so we need to do everything we can.
[Can we count on you in this fight to flip the Senate? Pitch in $5 right now to support Mark Kelly, John Hickenlooper, Sara Gideon, and Cal Cunningham.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9eb1/4fbb2af3/21cb6a57/5e806cf6/1107056850/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItY29yZS00LW1vbmV5Ym9tYiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA2MTZpIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-core-4-moneybomb?refcode=em200616i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Mark Kelly is an astronaut and former Navy captain. He's in the fight because people in Arizona and across the country need access to affordable health care and commonsense gun reform.
John Hickenlooper is a former Colorado governor and small business owner who is ready to bring his problem-solving skills to Washington to get things done and make real progress.
Sara Gideon is the Speaker of the Maine House of Representatives. Maine is ready for a leader like Sara on their side when it counts, from fighting for health care to supporting our economy.
And Cal Cunningham is an Army veteran and state lawmaker who wants to put North Carolina's Senate seat back to work for the people and fight for economic opportunity and equality for all.
**Mark, John, Sara, and Cal are the kinds of leaders we need in the Senate. Not only will they be strong leaders for their states, they will help us build a new Democratic majority.**
[If you're ready to flip the Senate, contribute $5 now to support these Democrats.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9eb1/4fbb2af3/21cb6a57/5e806cf6/1107056850/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItY29yZS00LW1vbmV5Ym9tYiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA2MTZpIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-core-4-moneybomb?refcode=em200616i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you,
Jacky

** **
**[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9eb1/4fbb2af3/21cb6a57/5e806cf6/1107056850/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItY29yZS00LW1vbmV5Ym9tYiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA2MTZpIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-core-4-moneybomb?refcode=em200616i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
** **
** **
