name: End Police Brutality [Black Democrats]
subject: We need your signature
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Congressional Black Caucus PAC
body:
We are DONE with racist police brutality. |
---
| [We are DONE with racist police brutality.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bde/783535009/VEsH/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/Pass-JPA-Action") So we're DEMANDING Congress pass the Justice in Policing Act.

[If 100,000 Democrats sign on by Friday, we can pass this bill and bring justice to our police system >>](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bde/783535009/VEsE/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/Pass-JPA-Action") | [IF YOU'RE WITH US CLICK HERE TO SIGN ON >>](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bde/783535009/VEsF/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/Pass-JPA-Action")
---
Our current laws let Police abuse innocent Americans. [Here's how passing the Justice in Policing Act would right this horrible wrong:](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bde/783535009/VEsC/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/Pass-JPA-Action")
• BAN deadly choke holds and no-knock warrants
• REQUIRE trainings to end racial profiling
• END police immunity so they are held accountable for their crimes
[But our 100,000 name petition to pass this bill is due on Friday. We're still 70,000 signatures short!](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bde/783535009/VEsD/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/Pass-JPA-Action")
[Join an army of Democrats fighting to end police brutality. Demand Congress pass the Justice in Policing Act now >>](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bde/783535009/VEsA/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/Pass-JPA-Action")
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bde/783535009/VEsB/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/Pass-JPA-Action")
---
There's no time to spare,

_Congressional Black Caucus PAC_

| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bd9/783535009/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bd8/783535009/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
| 455 Massachusetts Ave., NW #150-355
Washington DC 20001
---
Paid for and Authorized by the Congressional Black Caucus PAC
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bdb/783535009/VEsHBQ/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/update-your-information")

The Congressional Black Caucus works to increase the number of African Americans in the U.S. Congress, support non-Black candidates that champion our interests, and promote African American participation in the political process.

We're committed to getting African Americans and non-Black allies elected to the highest positions in Congress and activated at the polls to advance issues that matter in our communities.

By joining this grassroots movement, you are helping uplift African Americans in the political process. Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to combating the Trump Administration and promoting African American participation in the political process. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, [please click here.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041bda/783535009/VEsHBA/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_cbc_footer?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2019.02.26_X_Footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

| | [Donate $5 immediately ->](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041be5/783535009/VEsHBw/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_cbc_footer?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2019.02.26_X_Footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041be4/783535009/VEsHBg/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/less-emails") If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7f/693e3cfe/4e8f9555/3a041be7/783535009/VEsHAQ/?g= "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/unsubscribe") From the entire Congressial Black Caucus PAC team, thank you for your support!

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Twitter tried to CENSOR me & they LOST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
The left-wing thought police at Twitter attempted to censor me and threatened to permanently restrict my account. Let me explain. A few weeks ago, I began speaking out against the anarchists that had taken to our streets to burn churches, loot businesses and wreak havoc. I called for the use of the military if our local police forces became overwhelmed. My view was held by the vast majority of Americans and I used my twitter account to amplify my message of law and order.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42751595&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

The left-wing thought police at Twitter attempted to censor me and threatened to permanently restrict my account.

Let me explain.

A few weeks ago, I began speaking out against the anarchists that had taken to our streets to burn churches, loot businesses and wreak havoc. I called for the use of the military if our local police forces became overwhelmed.

My view was held by the vast majority of Americans and I used my twitter account to amplify my message of law and order.

The woke liberal mob lashed out against me. After publishing an opinion piece in The New York Times—the newspaper went into a total tailspin and fired the editor to appease the woke progressive journalists who had taken over the newsroom.

While the New York Times was melting down, a low-level staffer at Twitter contacted my office and demanded we take down tweets that they deemed were “offensive” and in violation of their policies.

Worse yet, we were told we had 30-minutes to act or I would permanently lose access to my twitter.

These hardball tactics sounded more like the plot of a ransom movie.

Peter, but I refused to back down.

We ignored their threats and demands and after a few hours, the twitter employee called back and indicated they were backing down

The left-wing thought police are unhinged and out of control. Twitter has targeted President Trump’s account and now they are coming after me!

But this isn’t just about my account or President Trump’s. Twitter and big tech companies are trying to silence conservative voices all across the country.

This November we not only have to fight against Joe Biden and the Democrats, we have to take on big tech and their ongoing censorship of conservative viewpoints.

Peter, I need you to stand with me in this fight against big tech’s censorship of conservatives. I am looking for 500 patriots to stand with me by midnight by making a donation of $5, $10, $25 or even $100. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Stop Censorship — Donate Now http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Big tech has a clear agenda—they want to hurt President Trump and his conservative allies and tilt the scales to elect Joe Biden and the Democrats.

Rest assured I will continue to speak out and won’t be bullied by the radical left-wing mob. We have to confront these issues head on, or we could totally be silenced by big tech.

The New York Times, Twitter and other big tech companies are being run by woke progressives who are operating these companies like social justice seminars.

Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey reportedly unfollowed the Twitter account of The New York Times Opinion section after it published my op-ed.

The only way we are going to win is if conservatives like you stand up and join my fight against censorship. I am looking for 500 patriots to stand with me by midnight by making a donation of $5, $10, $25 or even $100. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Stop Censorship — Donate Now http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Just remember if Twitter can call and threaten to shut down the account of a sitting Senator, they can do it to you.

I am counting on you stepping up and joining my movement to fight back against the censorship of conservatives. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

In service, Tom Cotton
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NTE1OTUS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42751595&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTUyMzMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Team Stanton
subject: Greg hears you and he is ready to take action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/htUzqyG-vCjDMcUhrITOENhn2JElazSKyIYdBxGZSvQ=/roBXTCFoF6MWsT08tdExbmtSyaKgikr4FhEa91AcG7U=)
Yesterday, Greg wrote to you about why he is supporting the Justice in Policing Act.
[✎ **SIGN ON TO SUPPORT THESE CRITICAL REFORMS **✎](https://act.myngp.com/el/htUzqyG-vCjDMcUhrITOENhn2JElazSKyIYdBxGZSvQ=/roBXTCFoF6MWsT08tdExbmtSyaKgikr4FhEa91AcG7U=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/htUzqyG-vCjDMcUhrITOENhn2JElazSKyIYdBxGZSvQ=/roBXTCFoF6MWsT08tdExbmtSyaKgikr4FhEa91AcG7U=)
* * *

Yesterday, Greg wrote to you about why he is supporting the _Justice in Policing Act_ , which is one of the most comprehensive steps being taken to protect Black Lives and reform law enforcement.

**We have seen thousands of Arizonans take to the streets across the state in Phoenix, Yuma, Scottsdale, Tucson, Kingman, Flagstaff, Prescott, and more. **

Greg sees you and he hears you -- and he is ready to take action in Congress to support reforms to law enforcement.

body:
I wanted to quickly check in with you ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. My team just informed me that, with only a few hours left, we're still $865 away from our $10,000 goal.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Hey friends,

I wanted to quickly check in with you ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. My team just informed me that, with only a few hours left, we're still $865 away from our $10,000 goal.

I'm ready to go to Congress to lift up the voices of all Kansans, but this race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, and I know we have a tough road ahead of us.

I want to provide Kansans, and all Americans, with the representation they deserve, and it's going to take all of us working together. That's why I'm asking for your support in these final hours before the deadline.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17911627/210667184/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg3OWEwMy1mN2IwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3OGeYhfzpsfFwyXdWpjo9DFP8osLGmqjZjhCmCwrro=)
| | Friends,

Democrats only need to flip [four seats](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17911628/210667195/899317765?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061720_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg3OWEwMy1mN2IwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3OGeYhfzpsfFwyXdWpjo9DFP8osLGmqjZjhCmCwrro=) this November to take back the Senate and end Mitch McConnell’s grip on our legislature.

While there are great candidates running across the country, these four candidates are currently leading in the polls: **Mark Kelly** in Arizona, **Cal Cunningham** in North Carolina, **Sara Gideon** in Maine, and [John Hickenlooper right here in Colorado!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17911629/210667204/899317765?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061720_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg3OWEwMy1mN2IwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3OGeYhfzpsfFwyXdWpjo9DFP8osLGmqjZjhCmCwrro=)

You might be wondering – they’re ahead, so what’s the big deal?

[These Democratic leads are a giant warning sign for Mitch McConnell and his mega-donors.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17911630/210667260/899317765?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061720_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg3OWEwMy1mN2IwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3OGeYhfzpsfFwyXdWpjo9DFP8osLGmqjZjhCmCwrro=)

[They’re currently outraising Democrats left and right, and these new polls have put the GOP on high alert. Just this week, the National Republican Senatorial Committee went up on air with a negative TV ad in Colorado. They’re ready to drop millions of dollars of dark money into these races to keep us from winning back the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17911631/210667280/899317765?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061720_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg3OWEwMy1mN2IwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3OGeYhfzpsfFwyXdWpjo9DFP8osLGmqjZjhCmCwrro=)

If we want to take back the Senate, we need to win these four seats. So these campaigns are launching an emergency 24-hour goal to raise $100,000 to help them beat McConnell’s wave of dark money.

[Friends, if you’re in a position to chip in, can you split a contribution between these four campaigns and mine? We all need to work together to take back our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17911632/210667297/899317765?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061720_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg3OWEwMy1mN2IwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3OGeYhfzpsfFwyXdWpjo9DFP8osLGmqjZjhCmCwrro=)
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I emailed recently about our mid-month fundraising deadline because my seat is incredibly competitive -- I won in 2016 by a fraction of a percent.
From Republicans refusing to take on big pharma while your drug prices soar to stacking courts with conservative judges, I don't need to remind you how important it is that we hold on to every Democratic Senate seat. The stakes are just too high.
I was really hoping you could donate $3 or more to help keep our fundraising on track. We unfortunately fell short of our mid-month goal, so I'm asking you now because you're one of my best supporters:
[**Will you please donate $3 or more to help us fill the gap? Hitting each and every fundraising goal -- even now -- is absolutely critical to securing a Democratic majority and protecting the future of the Supreme Court.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc442/2a380d31/23a008fb/f092d7/3601405859/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDYxN19td2gxX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200617_mwh1_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Your support is always so appreciated. New Hampshire races are historically close (and expensive!), so I really hope that you're able to help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Gabe Apodaca, MJ for Texas
subject: re: Sen. Cornyn's Retirement Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texans can't afford to have a Senator who works for anyone but you. Will you help MJ retire Senator Cornyn in November?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d335/3970481037/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter, Just making sure you heard about Sen. Cornyn's Retirement Fund. I think we can all agree Senator Cornyn's retirement is 18 years overdue -- Texans seriously can't afford to go another day with a senator that sells us out.

**[We're going to need every single member of our grassroots team to step up and pitch in to help MJ retire Senator Cornyn for good.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")**

The clock is ticking -- we're less than 30 days from the runoff and Sen. Cornyn's dark-money allies are already spending a huge sum of money to keep him in office working for their interests, not yours. It's going to be up to us to make sure MJ will be the one to retire Sen. Cornyn in November -- **[so will you pitch in to Cornyn's Retirement Fund to help MJ send Sen. Cornyn packing?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")** Thanks, y'all.

Gabe Apodaca
Political Director
MJ for Texas \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar HQ**
Subject: Sen. Cornyn's retirement plan
> Peter -- After nearly two decades in the U.S. Senate selling out Texans to the highest special interest bidder, we think it's time to send Sen. Cornyn into retirement, where he'll have plenty of time for social media. After all, Sen. Cornyn spends A LOT of his time tweeting instead of leading.
>
> Frankly, it's embarrassing. From quoting Mussolini to saying COVID-19 is a "piece of cake" and denying systemic problems with police brutality, Texans deserve better. **[That's why we're asking you to donate to Sen. Cornyn's Retirement Fund!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10") | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")
> ---|---
> [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10") | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")
> ---|---
> [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10") | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")
> ---|---
> [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10") | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")
> ---|---
> Look, we don't think Sen. Cornyn's Twitter antics are helpful to anyone. But if he's going to carry on tweeting, we think he should do it as a private citizen, where his words don't carry the weight of a U.S. Senator.
>
> MJ believes we should put Texans first, and she'll spend her time in the Senate working to expand health care, enact real protections for our planet and climate, pass gun safety legislation, and carry out meaningful reforms for our justice system. But she can only do this with YOUR help.
>
> **Our grassroots team is devoted to electing a far better representative of Texas values, so pitch in to help us retire Sen. Cornyn today.**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d32b/3970481037/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d32a/3970481037/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d329/3970481037/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d328/3970481037/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d32f/3970481037/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__")**
> \-- Team MJ
>
>
>
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d334/3970481037/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200617.2nd__1566__&amount=10")**
>

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d32e/3970481037/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1566&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901da/7f51f7bc/4e953174/4ef6d32d/3970481037/VEsEBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

body:
[1]Powered By People

We’re about
to launch phase two, and we need as many people as possible on board.

Our ultimate mission is simple, but huge: turn out enough voters in Texas
to win a majority in the State House and stop Donald Trump’s second term.

Next, we’re turning our focus to identifying likely Democratic voters so
that we can remind them to vote when it matters most. But to identify
enough voters to win, we need you!

Can you help us start phase two as strong as possible? Sign up for one or
both of these upcoming phone banks to help us identify key voters.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-id-phone-bank_attend/34376?source=ema20200617-94249-betoeventinvite&t=1001&akid=94249%2E444211%2E_8-LEe ]Virtual Voter ID Phone Bank with Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-id-phone-bank_attend/34376?source=ema20200617-94249-betoeventinvite&t=1002&akid=94249%2E444211%2E_8-LEe ]Get more info or RSVP

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-id-phone-bank_attend/34377?source=ema20200617-94249-betoeventinvite&t=1004&akid=94249%2E444211%2E_8-LEe ]Get more info or RSVP

body:
|
---

name: Team Warner
subject: One chance to beat Trump and take back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We need to win Mark's seat for Democrats to win back the Senate -- the path to a Senate majority runs right through Virginia.
|
---

| |
We'll cut right to the chase, Derek: While Mark Warner has been focused on doing his job in the Senate, Trump's allies are pouring money into Virginia.

We need to win Mark's seat for Democrats to win back the Senate -- the path to a Senate majority runs right through Virginia. Mark wants to stay in Washington working for _every_ Virginian, but he's going to need your help. **[If you have the means, will you consider contributing to Mark's re-election campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d42e/53d9897e/54bb8455/1c887f4e/381965003/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keep?refcode=20200617_f_1_nd__613__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Mark has been fighting in the Senate to address the dual crises America is facing right now: the coronavirus pandemic and the reality of racial injustice in our country. This is all in keeping with his overall focus: putting Virginia's families first. He's still committed to making sure everyone has access to affordable health care, to reducing the cost of higher education, and to building an economy that works for everyone.

Last week, Mark signed on as an original co-sponsor to the _Justice in Policing Act_ , which would implement meaningful structural reform to our policing system. And just today, the Senate passed a bill Mark co-authored, _The Great American Outdoors Act_ , which will support 100,000 jobs nationwide -- 10,000 of those in Virginia.

The need for honest, competent leadership is clear. We _need_ a Democratic Senate to pick up where President Obama left off and get our country back on track.

**[We can't allow a Republican Senate to control our Supreme Court and sabotage our health care any longer.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d42e/53d9897e/54bb8455/1c887f4d/381965003/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keep?refcode=20200617_f_1_nd__613__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you and be well.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d42e/53d9897e/54bb8455/1c887f4c/381965003/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keep?refcode=20200617_f_1_nd__613__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump unveils roadmap to stop veteran suicide
body:
More than 6,000 veterans die by suicide each year, taking their own lives at a rate one-and-a-half times that of other Americans. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01ee1aed04&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 17, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump unveils roadmap to stop veteran suicide**

**More than 6,000** veterans die by suicide each year,**** taking their own lives at a rate one-and-a-half times that of other Americans. Female veterans are at an even higher risk, with a suicide rate of more than twice that of other Americans.

**From 2005 to 2016** , the veteran suicide rate rose by an alarming 26 percent. In the past, these heroes were too often overlooked by our leaders, who sent our troops to fight in foreign lands without taking care of them once they returned home.

🎬 [**WATCH: Wounded Warrior Chad Hiser’s incredible story**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc8787e69b&e=3ee4985eea)

**Under President Trump,** our veterans have been championed since day one. In 2018, he signed the largest funding bill for the Department of Veterans Affairs in history, securing $86.5 billion. He also restored much-needed accountability and discipline to the VA system.

**“We've removed more** than 9,000 VA workers who were not giving our veterans the care, respect, attention that they've earned,” President Trump said.

**Today, the VA took another major step forward,** unveiling the President’s Roadmap to Empower Veterans and End a National Tragedy of Suicide, also known as “PREVENTS.” The 10-point roadmap includes a major public health campaign on veteran suicide prevention.

🎬 **[Second Lady Karen Pence: Time to end the “stigma of mental health”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7db553116e&e=3ee4985eea)**

**The** **roadmap will implement** changes in how veteran suicide is researched as well, allowing providers to better understand the unique risk profile of every patient. The roadmap will also pursue partnerships that strengthen community-based, nonprofit, and faith-based interventions.

**Veteran suicide** is a national tragedy, and improving the quality of care for our nation’s heroes is one of President Trump’s top priorities. After years of scandal and neglect from past administrations, this President has reorganized the VA around the principle that our veterans deserve the best treatment available on Earth.

[**Watch President Trump announce roadmap to address veteran suicide**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4c813ef49&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **S****ecretary Perdue and**** Ivanka Trump help deliver food boxes**

**Agriculture Secretary Sonny P****erdue** , **Ivanka Trump,**** ** and other Administration officials met with minority faith leaders in Pittsburgh yesterday, where they held a listening session before participating in a food box distribution for families in need.

**“I was grateful to listen** and learn from faith & community leaders how together we can bring about healing and holistic revitalization to underserved communities across the nation,” Ms. Trump tweeted.

**The Farmers to Families Food Box** program has delivered nearly 20 million boxes to date. All told, as part of the Administration’s ongoing Coronavirus relief efforts, the program will purchase $461 million in fresh fruits and vegetables, $317 million in dairy products, $258 million in meats, and $175 million in combination boxes to support both American farmers and underserved families.

[**IN PHOTOS: Secretary Perdue and Ivanka Trump distribute Farmers to Families food boxes**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e0939a2d5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump announces the PREVENTS Task Force Roadmap** | June 17, 2020
---
|

name: Greg Pence
subject: Everything’s on the line this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Democrats want to defund our police departments in 2020. Will you stand in the way? [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=32abdca4fb23482ca90c445302435d34&_e=W8yvGAqeGcrxS3RZRG_AF2rRB5QYEi0cS9RgghoTORBNhSeOntkXfvxztL1GpPQMv1RZNV1OlWic2T-C5dfZ9IHCDofVZQLVkHsTcddYUX0Vxj2Ffe4KyNiiwNdN1vnrRRJaWHyHFYvvCrIi5ql4j-097EMfBcyZ7k6ju-wLjw04B6baGxvGpNmnzsxdjlbTHpjk3frokhhwXRFN1Kldn3-YMNblwvJV7fTbwr4_XyFHLbDgdH2f5IetYis8amR58W7CKTRYtnK6SFQflUprfpbs5BTmMUfhMtgE3whgFYY4kz_d7Fs3M8zEFlrtPye0Rvmt4dVmwlL2bk1IRvpfpnEzfxXjxrnW2ZQmmQm38v4pwyJz7BvlGnzBcu3qj2cSCVNb_alk5BzwQpU8vx15HlAlnr3-vDw6jC6hPPyWbaQ%3D) Friend, I can’t overstate just how crucial the next few months will be for our nation. When we head to the polls in November, we won’t just be deciding the future of the Presidency and Congress.
**There is so much more than that.**
We’ll be deciding the future of law enforcement, abortion, and gun rights in America. These are issues that define who we are as a country, and we can’t afford to get this wrong.
**Our conservative Hoosier values are being threatened by anarchists and radicals on the Left right now, and I’m looking for just 100 supporters to stand with me and fight back.** [**CHIP IN $10 TO DEFEND CONSERVATIVE VALUES**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=32abdca4fb23482ca90c445302435d34&_e=W8yvGAqeGcrxS3RZRG_AF2rRB5QYEi0cS9RgghoTORBNhSeOntkXfvxztL1GpPQMfQDxnPF-77xuEHPIgF59pb-B9JCEipGe13pD5WuZRqiV39GWeydEVnjiKhDD6i3OqbjJ0TVQGWm5twiSlMYB7ErYHZLudHPPKZPwPM95isHkffFpuFfIJfuCKkoeSvw342vV-BIgf0hKK-ld7Xbww2XRlxn6lHcHWn7xALjzT6adJmcUC-3QY0-IlTLNPnPHdnwCFtWdeCwnHdi1ahpv7j43BYU7amUHnchqLiCnOmhSsh_Bo-zhOnuqMynt7tryio6GHA7D-Lr8o9clUvbEvCXnok93irH7vrUk7bH96wejnbyK_qDZ0wglxgiH4WgN2uXVz1H_rPLLZfKKmW24R6cNNEkhDHYdTScoL2N87hI%3D) Friend, the Democratic agenda for 2020 and beyond is becoming crystal-clear right now. They want to defund our police departments, dismantle our 2nd Amendment, and legalize late-term abortions in all 50 states.
This isn’t what the America I grew up in stands for, and I’m fighting every day in Washington to make sure that our conservative values aren’t forgotten.
**Will you fight alongside me today? I’m looking for just 100 Hoosiers to chip in $10 and come to the defense of our conservative values, which are under attack right now.** [**CHIP IN $10 TO DEFEND CONSERVATIVE VALUES**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=32abdca4fb23482ca90c445302435d34&_e=W8yvGAqeGcrxS3RZRG_AF2rRB5QYEi0cS9RgghoTORBNhSeOntkXfvxztL1GpPQMfQDxnPF-77xuEHPIgF59pb-B9JCEipGe13pD5WuZRqiV39GWeydEVnjiKhDD6i3OqbjJ0TVQGWm5twiSlMYB7ErYHZLudHPPKZPwPM95isHkffFpuFfIJfuCKkoeSvw342vV-BIgf0hKK-ld7XbwwyOD3ljlLAoKzIghvjDj7w2LyYiNjpOIAlGgrPrMgVEnRAjPnA8CUMuOzQhfcCrmR71yWQK5i8dNiYXRSmPA2qubINayBKTuQ_DzBBQ_ddkfdK2dQ4u9U0oNnY-DMZdos-8MrO1TgEs7xTYEDPXz4rD2w4nXWI1WqIqFhm0Mvy5fhusDuHyNrg69iHwHex3PB4Dqg3nc76zRyvcg0TtWKlU%3D) I’m proud to stand for what’s right in Congress - even if it’s not politically correct.
Thank you for your continued support, Greg Pence |

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Testing in high-density communities
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
If you've tuned into the press conferences regularly over the last few months, you've heard me talk about our work fighting this virus in our high-density communities. The reality is that while our state is doing remarkably well overall, we still remain deeply concerned about what we're seeing in poorer communities and immigrant communities.
In many cases, that's because these communities tend to be more densely populated. We also know there are other barriers that prevent people from seeking testing and treatment, including language barriers, historic lack of access to medical care, and distrust. So throughout this crisis, we've had to keep our focus on what's going on in these communities and take an individualized approach to keep Rhode Islanders safe. Today, I want to talk about some of the measures we're taking.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ms-v5d2mFoFQ7qN43r0EKpKoeI3HSzo6ottc2Wb9QFkqR-zwesfzDwigG2M2MHeiRuerxeowLMC3USKrfyyXy7M_6WmD4NzHXy-Ts3qD_8iZ874DjAhhoFI4NBy3TRiWdyFKkFOkF3I4d5uFPdDtzfCdDjDlDoGC0IwiNE0xIRaliUfJeIFC9puTYuNbYwv43dE12BwMPE=&c=5T2_tSuasEIiHI9OtOZNo_t5YlB6cA-jNaKXpvEQ9EyiQZrWrib25A==&ch=zmGn4gLT2K3M97U2_UJd8dK8nlJkGRL5FZJ4AOOylrJiV22TVoaq0Q==)
---
| The truth is that every community is different. What works in Exeter may not work in Central Falls. But it goes beyond just rural vs. urban communities. What works in Central Falls may not work in Providence. What works in one neighborhood in Providence may not work in another neighborhood in Providence. In order to effectively fight this virus, we have to be on the ground in every single community. That's what we're doing:

* Testing: We're bringing testing right into people's neighborhoods. We've worked closely with community health centers to bring testing where it's most accessible to the most people. We've created drive-through and walk-up testing sites.
* Health Equity Zones: We're continuing to invest in our Health Equity Zones--which are already integrated into these communities--to ensure that we're reaching people where they are and providing support most effectively.
* Contact tracing: We've worked hard to ensure that our contact tracers and case investigators--the people from the Department of Health who will work with you if you test positive to put all of your contacts into quarantine--are multilingual and representative of the communities we're engaging with.

And we've seen signs of progress in just the past few weeks. Across our urban core, our percent positive rate has dropped from the low twenties and high teens down to 10% or less. We are definitely encouraged by the fact that our percent positive rates in these communities appear to be trending down, but we are not declaring victory by any means. We will continue to watch this very closely.
Our early warning system is critical to our fight against coronavirus, and especially so in these high-density communities. In order to ensure that folks in these communities have access to this program, today I'm announcing that we are adding new asymptomatic testing sites. Eligible Rhode Islanders without symptoms will be able to get tested at four Stop & Shop locations across the state. The locations are:

* Manton Ave. in Providence
* West River St. in Providence
* Cottage St. in Pawtucket
* Warwick Ave. in Cranston

As a reminder, these tests are appointment-only. You cannot just show up at one of these Stop & Shops and get tested. You can make an appointment at RIC, CCRI or the Stop & Shop sites by going to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ms-v5d2mFoFQ7qN43r0EKpKoeI3HSzo6ottc2Wb9QFkqR-zwesfzJb_sy4jXSTXI_IBsBYtU7i4EzKZ_y251xQLHxPlHz_bgJA-P_jK3cZnXke5kqry7qyAaIZm09AipvfH9dUzPHE=&c=5T2_tSuasEIiHI9OtOZNo_t5YlB6cA-jNaKXpvEQ9EyiQZrWrib25A==&ch=zmGn4gLT2K3M97U2_UJd8dK8nlJkGRL5FZJ4AOOylrJiV22TVoaq0Q==) or calling the Department of Health at 222-8022.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ms-v5d2mFoFQ7qN43r0EKpKoeI3HSzo6ottc2Wb9QFkqR-zwesfzIsjdBmo2pnTG0ejMBoJrKa2vMUpA73cXFcadmjazp2I8gVWV6jSttKqscO0xbczYCT-igL57IuPiI49gDVK8p8i_JHr7bgbsTaLkndeoJ9jEpa7oKN3szQLhaGxZmyekr7qiZIbYWjzDr68nxU3S_s=&c=5T2_tSuasEIiHI9OtOZNo_t5YlB6cA-jNaKXpvEQ9EyiQZrWrib25A==&ch=zmGn4gLT2K3M97U2_UJd8dK8nlJkGRL5FZJ4AOOylrJiV22TVoaq0Q==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ms-v5d2mFoFQ7qN43r0EKpKoeI3HSzo6ottc2Wb9QFkqR-zwesfzIsjdBmo2pnTG0ejMBoJrKa2vMUpA73cXFcadmjazp2I8gVWV6jSttKqscO0xbczYCT-igL57IuPiI49gDVK8p8i_JHr7bgbsTaLkndeoJ9jEpa7oKN3szQLhaGxZmyekr7qiZIbYWjzDr68nxU3S_s=&c=5T2_tSuasEIiHI9OtOZNo_t5YlB6cA-jNaKXpvEQ9EyiQZrWrib25A==&ch=zmGn4gLT2K3M97U2_UJd8dK8nlJkGRL5FZJ4AOOylrJiV22TVoaq0Q==).
---
| I want to be very clear: our work in high-density communities is not done. I'm happy that we've made progress, but no one's zip code should determine their health. In the weeks and months ahead, we're going to continue to provide on-the-ground support and resources to these communities.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ms-v5d2mFoFQ7qN43r0EKpKoeI3HSzo6ottc2Wb9QFkqR-zwesfzDwigG2M2MHeLMsUfqko-TX6QDgxqXEkKPl83Ed7TryV_xyteuKB5L09y6gUpUYoi-j-ulED5ABeOIbKHeJM2rlPDu9bLG9lhPZ7NsDaMp4KSwvbBShuzWgWCf2m-CHBvmnis8BsKNCuVEOfZxkElDhtXsRxhtHMgtBRcUKLOi1_TCtCC0fTARvsWaCyXSynUXgBPxJdVcRVoj8c0TUdp7Yng4xnW2HrLgo3OTRsy0ncozBfJrEldriW2zAB9ZQ_LVpY_01Us-8D7_Uw8zBmAZGBZR5LqdOV6fsWGlugHgA-Apg463Oc49Z0EYk16uIqSZNvZQuOkkLIvReu8JciPLRpUdpi8EY9qE4BQxQsTrwFdojxm3tUFQ2Q0PrEmEFS0JPo4M_4EPjL&c=5T2_tSuasEIiHI9OtOZNo_t5YlB6cA-jNaKXpvEQ9EyiQZrWrib25A==&ch=zmGn4gLT2K3M97U2_UJd8dK8nlJkGRL5FZJ4AOOylrJiV22TVoaq0Q==).

name: christyforcongress.com
subject: Dear Mike: Don't you have better things to do than attack reproductive rights?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Mike Garcia is at it again, Peter.

In the month he's been in office, Garcia has made attacking reproductive choice his priority -- all in the midst of a historic pandemic and nationwide protests against racial inequality.

On his _very first day_ as a member of Congress, Garcia joined far right-wingers' attempts to force a vote on extreme anti-choice legislation.

**Now, he's cosponsoring another radical anti-choice bill -- one that would ban all abortions and could end up making certain kinds of birth control illegal.** It's hard enough already for many Americans to get access to affordable, reliable birth control. We don't need Garcia and his radical GOP allies limiting health care choices even further.

One thing's clear: We _have_ to get this guy out of office this November and elect Christy, who will go to Congress to get to work on the issues that really matter -- like fighting for racial equality and working to save lives and jobs during the COVID-19 pandemic.

**[Chip in $5 or more to Christy's campaign now to make sure we have a new leader for CA-25 as soon as possible.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec955/1287759965/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec956/1287759965/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec957/1287759965/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec952/1287759965/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec955/1287759965/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full")
We've got one question for Mike Garcia: _Don't you have better things to do than to prioritize slashing reproductive rights?_

Of course, Garcia's first instinct as a new representative was to fall in line as a party loyalist rather than work for the people of our district. We know that Garcia and his hero Donald Trump love nothing more than to ignore the real issues and focus instead on partisan attacks that will fire up their base.

We need a leader who will stand up for the people of our district, not embrace the extremist wing of their party. We need a leader who knows that the right to choose is fundamental. We need a leader who will spend their time in Congress focusing on solving the problems that matter most.

**[That's Christy. Chip in $5 or more now to send Mike Garcia packing and finally elect a _real_ representative for CA-25 >>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec955/1287759965/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full")**

\-- ChristyForCongress.com

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec955/1287759965/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba62/29776869/9a09df8/569ec955/1287759965/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTdfcnJhbnRpY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200617_rrantichoice-full")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: it’s time for the Indiana GOP Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Tomorrow’s the big day – the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention will be broadcast live tomorrow at 5:30 p.m. ET/4:30 p.m. CT! Friend, Tomorrow’s the big day! The 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention will be broadcast live tomorrow at 5:30 p.m. ET/4:30 p.m. CT! While we’re all disappointed we can’t all come together in person this year, there are still lots of reasons to be excited to tune in tomorrow — including watching Eric deliver the keynote speech. You can watch the convention live in Indianapolis on WISH-TV (channel 8) and in South Bend on WHME-TV (Channel 46). In other markets, the convention will be livestreamed at **[Indiana.gop/stateconvention](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0a165bb261b048b99e5b7742b8256abe&_e=GrDY6Gidfa3fJXIHunaikFtcjB--5MjQ7BTm2Au6TzCybguB5glzZzeAchRlAyTstAfTlCOI4cVJd_qQ9vjZHOCrkL5Yr7FrEeB33YMZBZoXlMoXiQBq2NLmgLYjTsv-iNXggLa781mDVg9aa9OfuFRaMLFfWaDvbikJLLU1LcGA0s9-jSdjH0SbUFy57wKjhtqJp2lywaCG-0YaMTOUeilnBQpc2OoksmVbP_ZhbfdP5Tv2svt_wOw-KlLchznMRIPKWA5eY-Rs-THhF6vNfjoOR7Cx7jMwi-gcfn5fEn_LVNE1ndkaH-CRRxkM2RS4Yw2rJyOpSCmwlYhnFzOn1t0TGhOG-nxNV_A0xs_9w4c8b4J1TsuyiqUF8O8CenzJPI2-XEBIioL45sEO840VBA%3D%3D)** and **[wishtv.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0a165bb261b048b99e5b7742b8256abe&_e=6SvRwxicSHJhk6cIHUzSL0uxfkw78wCgAzcWREDLx_PMG5RU3U0q7ZOtZctteLDkhJ87NH9WV83koko0A4nIgISr-P5ZfGO5ksML4LzZAsWHlLwvqxoZM-R-UmPfeXxLiubydp2tDaApYY8C8dvAZaRMFIBQcXtRxNZhc4-JZ5AW5JWaxnf-xcKRph53eYOb_9AKN5_GM1GCBrLedqMV3rjCAmVQYVMoFJ_LDRXVpKxVlx7U-a3lSebeked1pZ-Z2baN7BIHkcBJmGvBrD1XST5YIVIu-q6lvHZAbrn0dGmKw6uLltbeXgDJcNoGUWzxzxjK8Ug-bGRzq4Kuo0UwFVzoLAu4812dC_S9w02szDEo8V48XJOyr7CGa-phOIfM)**. Don’t miss out on your chance to hear about how we’re going to continue building One Indiana for another four years. Here are a few reasons why you should tune in tomorrow:
* **Join 1,800 of our closest friends (virtually):** There’s no doubt – this year is different, but you can still watch with friends across the state! You could even host your own watch party on Facebook!
* **Hear from Governor Holcomb:** Listen as he will deliver the keynote address, outlining his vision for Indiana’s next four years.
* **Hear from our special guests:** You’ll hear from Chairman Hupfer, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, Second Lady Karen Pence, your Republican representatives at the federal level, and other GOP activists and leaders from across the state!
* **Make history:** This is the first time our convention will be broadcast live on TV and livestreamed – making history and opening the doors to the Republican Party wider than they’ve ever been!
* **Hear from Indiana’s Attorney General candidates:** With delegates selecting the nominee for this important statewide audience, you’ll want to hear what these candidates have to say.
* **Catch a behind-the-scenes look:** We’ve never seen the curtain of our Indiana Republican Party lifted like this. With live TV, we’ll see this event like never before!
* **Watch from home:** From the comfort of your own home you’ll be able to relax, grab some snacks and settle in for the big night!
